summary: New `ab` parent + `ab run` subcommand (internal/cli/ab.go): runs two Actors with the same input, normalizes both via the shared schema, persists items + run history, and reports items/novel/cost plus overlap percentage. --judge picks the winner: novelty | cost-per-item | cost-per-novel | item-count.
rationale: Head-to-head Actor comparison needs the normalize + novelty layers; impossible from the REST API alone.
